variable.description: Default organization name for multi-tenant requests

request.description: Creates a new tenant schema (e.g., tenant_acme) for complete data isolation

Public endpoint used by the frontend to verify whether a subdomain (x-org-name) is valid before loading the app. Returns only: id, appSubdomain, companyName, logo. Returns 404 if the subdomain does not exist.
Public endpoint. Registers a regular tenant user (role is always 'user'). Requires x-org-name header for tenant scoping.

header.description: Tenant subdomain the new admin belongs to

request.description: Protected endpoint — requires a valid system_admin JWT. Creates a company_admin user in the tenant specified by x-org-name.

url.description: Protected endpoint — requires a valid system_admin JWT. Creates another system_admin user.

request.description: Returns paginated companies. Response: { data: { items: [...], meta: { total, page, limit, totalPages } } }
Returns paginated users. Response: { data: { items: [...], meta: { total, page, limit, totalPages } } }
Run database migration to create/update tables for a tenant schema. Use this to add new manifest tables to existing tenants.
Public endpoint that returns basic company info (id, subdomain, name, logo)
Returns paginated companies. Response: { data: { items: [...], meta: { total, page, limit, totalPages } } }
Upload company logo image (multipart/form-data)
Upload image to Cloudinary. Returns: { url, publicId, width, height }
Delete image from Cloudinary by publicId
Returns paginated users. Response: { data: { items: [...], meta: { total, page, limit, totalPages } } }

Recalculates handling charge using the principal's charge setup and house BL CBM. Prerequisites: master manifest must have principalId, principal must have active currency + charge types configured, house BL must have totalCBM > 0.
Creates or fully replaces a principal's charge setup. calcMode: MIN_MAX | MAX | FIXED. Max 10 charge types.

item.name: Get Charge Audit Log by Principal

request.description: Creates a debit note line item for a job. purposeCode and detailCode must match existing transaction_purposes and transaction_purpose_details records.
Returns job + tracking line items + grandTotal. Equivalent to VB6 FrmDebitNotes.

body.raw:
{
  "jobNo": "JOB-2024-001",
  "ie": "ACME IMPORTS LTD",
  "custRefNo": "REF001",
  "vesselName": "MAERSK VESSEL",
  "vesselEta": "2024-01-15",
  "invoiceNo": "INV-001",
  "totDuty": 15000.00,
  "qtyDescription": "50 CARTONS OF ELECTRONICS",
  "destination": "TEMA",
  "fileDate": "2024-01-10",
  "blNo": "BL123456",
  "transType": "IMPORT",
  "agencyFee": 1200.00,
  "jobStatus": "ACTIVE",
  "jobFinanceeType": "CASH",
  "jobFinanceeName": "ACME IMPORTS LTD",
  "jobFinanceeAmount": 15000.00,
  "vatNhilStatus": "1"
}

request.description: Returns current balance and total bank charges for the account (uses account UUID)
bankNameId is the UUID from the bank-names endpoint
bankAccountId is the UUID from the accounts endpoint. Balance is automatically updated.
Balance is automatically decreased.
Aggregated debit/credit/charges/balance per account grouped by bank name (equivalent to VB6 RptxBank.EXSUM_Bank)
Public endpoint — no auth required
Returns the single-row global FOB/freight/insurance rates
Creates or updates the global CIF rates (upsert)
Fetch all CIF line items for a job using its jobNo
jobId is required. refNo is auto-filled from job.jobNo. cifValue = fobValue + frtValue + insValue
Soft-deletes all CIF line items for a given reference number

item.name: Get Rent Charge Bracket by ID
